# Mona Mayhem Design System

## Aesthetic
This project follows a retro-neon cyberpunk arcade aesthetic. Every component must feel like it belongs in a 1980s arcade cabinet crossed with a neon-lit cyberpunk city.

## Colors
- Primary background: #0a0a0f
- Surface: #0d0d1a
- Border: #1a1a3e
- Primary button: #FF00FF (magenta)
- Secondary button: #00FFFF (cyan)
- Win color: #00FF41 (matrix green)
- Loss color: #FF0040 (neon red)
- Text: #e0e0ff
- Accent: #FF00FF

## Typography
- Headings: "Press Start 2P" font always
- Body: monospace only
- All text uppercase for headings
- Letter spacing: 2px minimum on labels

## Components
- Always use CSS Grid for layouts
- All buttons have neon glow box-shadow
- All cards have neon border glow
- Use pixel-style borders where possible
- Add retro arcade sound effect comments in JS (e.g. // *bleep* *bloop*)
- Health bars must pulse/animate
- Power-up cards must flicker like a neon sign

## Game Lore
- Players are GitHub warriors battling in the Contribution Arena
- Contributions = battle power
- Power-ups are ancient GitHub artifacts
- The arena exists in cyberspace
- Match history is called "Battle Chronicles"
- Wins are called "Victories", losses are "Defeats"

## Rules
- Never use plain white backgrounds
- Never use default browser styles
- Always add hover effects on interactive elements
- Every new component must have a neon glow effect
